title: Cursor Madrid — Felipe Basurto
description: Cursor Community Madrid — meetups, cafés, hackathons, and photos.
intro_md:
[← Back to CV](../../)

# Cursor Community (Madrid)

![Cursor](../../assets/companies/cursor.png)As **Cursor Madrid Ambassador** since ~May 2025, I run meetups, cafés, and hackathons in Madrid. This page is a visual log of those events. More context and photos: [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/felipe-basurto-barrio/).

---

events.title: 2nd Cursor Meetup
events.body_md:
Partners **Tinybird** and **Kfund**. Talks, hallway conversations, and hands-on learning.

- **getshell.ai** — shell-based agent workflows (OpenClaw) demoed for builders.
- **Cursor** — **Cloud Agents**, long-running workflows, and the product direction ([cursor.com/onboard](https://cursor.com/onboard)).

events.title: Café Cursor
events.body_md:
All-day **casual coworking** at a café: people shipped their own projects, met other Cursor users, and talked shop — no talk track, no demos.

Venue **eito** with three zones (main workspace, quieter back, upstairs hub).

**Cursor engineers** on-site for debugging and Q&A.

events.title: Cursor Hackathon × HappyRobot × Kibo Ventures
events.body_md:
Challenge: integrate a **HappyRobot AI agent** into a working product using Cursor.

**Winners**

1. **TravelBot** — corporate travel end to end (stays, transport, dining).
2. **MedTracker** — automated daily calls to elderly relatives for medication check-ins.
3. **Santa's Call** — Santa calls your kid about behavior and wish lists.

events.title: First Cursor Hackathon (Madrid)
events.body_md:
Partners **Enzo Ventures**, **OneCoWork**, **productmakers.ai**. We opened with a build block; good turnout and a waitlist.

Theme: **gamification** — **~2 hours** to ship with Cursor.

**Winners**

1. **RoomieScore** — chores, expenses, and co-living for roommates.
2. **FocoQuest** — productivity as missions and progression.
3. **FinPlay** — personal finance made visual.

events.title: First official Cursor meetup (Madrid)
events.body_md: Hosted at **Google for Startups Madrid** with **Takos**. Community lightning talks and project demos from attendees.

events.title: Cursor Ambassador
events.body_md: I joined as **Cursor Madrid Ambassador** in ~June 2025, with a focus on **meetups, workshops, and community** in Madrid.
